summary: Frontend-only visual regression test of button-spacing fix on Tool127 (Homepage, /dpd, /printer, /password, /wea). DOM inspection + bounding-box measurements show fix works ONLY on Homepage (16px v_gap) and PasswordGenerator (12px h_gap). On /dpd, /printer, /wea the second pill button is still glued to the first (0px vertical gap) because the second button is wrapped in <Link to='/'> which renders as an inline <a>; Tailwind space-y-4 applies margin-top:16px but vertical margins on display:inline elements are IGNORED, so the fix has NO visual effect on those 3 tools.

ui_bugs.issue: Start Test and 'Check out other tools' buttons still touching (0px vertical gap). Container has space-y-4 but the second button is inside <Link to='/'> which is display:inline, so margin-top is ignored. Fix: add className='block' to <Link> (or use w-full block).
'Generate and Print' and 'Check out other tools' buttons still touching (0px vertical gap). Same inline <a> root cause.
'Grant Permission' and 'Cancel' buttons still touching (0px vertical gap). Same inline <a> root cause.

issues: Adjacent pill buttons visually glued together (rounded pills sharing edge). Homepage has correct 16px separation; three tools do NOT match the homepage standard.

action_items: Add className='block' to the <Link to='/'> wrapping the second pill button in PixelTest.jsx (~L385), PrinterTest.jsx (~L711), WebcamAudioTest.jsx (~L727). Alternative: wrap the inner <button> in a <div className='block'> or move w-full/block onto the Link. This is the ONLY change needed — space-y-4 is already present and will then take effect.
After fix, re-verify with bounding-box measurement: vertical gap between the two buttons should be 16px (not 0).
critical_code_review_comments: Root cause is a common CSS gotcha: Tailwind's space-y-* uses margin-top on siblings, which does not push inline elements vertically. Any place that stacks a react-router Link inside a space-y-* container must have the Link set to display:block/flex/grid.
Consider replacing space-y-* with flex flex-col gap-4 on these containers — gap works regardless of child display type, avoiding future repetitions of this bug.
The pattern <Link><button className='w-full ...' /></Link> is used in many places; verify no other tool pages share the same regression.

success_rate.frontend: 50% (3 of 6 scenarios failed — button-spacing fix ineffective on /dpd, /printer, /wea)

test_credentials: N/A — all tested routes are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Measure vertical gap between the two buttons via bounding-box after re-fix. Expect 16px (space-y-4). Playwright locators used: '[data-testid=dpd-start-test]' + 'text="Check out other tools"'; 'text="Generate and Print"' + 'text="Check out other tools"'; 'text="Grant Permission"' + 'text="Cancel"'. Also verify the wrapping <a> element has computed display != inline (should be block).
rca_of_the_issue: Symptom: 'buttons glued together' on /dpd, /printer, /wea despite space-y-4 class. Reproduction: open each URL, inspect the button-group container's children — first child is <button>, second is <a> (react-router Link). Computed styles show <a> has display:inline and marginTop:16px, but browsers ignore vertical margins on inline non-replaced elements, hence 0px effective spacing. Fix: force the Link to a block-level display (className='block' or 'block w-full'), or restructure with flex+gap. Verified working on Homepage where the equivalent Link has className='block'.
